Respected Sir/Madam,

Thank you,

reports.complaintLetter:
To,
The Assistant Revenue Officer and Health Inspector,
Mandya Municipal Division,
Mandya City Municipal Council (MCMC),
Karnataka.

Subject: Urgent Request for Clearance of Massive Illegal Waste Dumping in Jayanagar (Ward 12) at Coordinates (12.521623258731791, 76.8778586979221)

Respected Sir/Madam,

I am writing to draw your immediate attention to an alarming environmental and public health crisis occurring in Jayanagar (Ward 12). A massive mountain of mixed municipal solid waste, primarily consisting of single-use plastics, domestic refuse, and non-biodegradable debris, has accumulated at coordinates 12.521623258731791, 76.8778586979221. 

This unauthorized dumpsite has reached critical levels, serving as an active breeding ground for harmful vectors and emitting highly noxious odors that plague the local residents. The unchecked runoff of toxic leachate from this unregulated landfill poses an imminent threat of contamination to the local groundwater table. This flagrant violation of the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2016 requires immediate corrective action.

We urgently request the immediate deployment of municipal clearance dumper trucks, earthmovers, and sanitation personnel to clear this waste mountain, sanitize the area, and restore civic sanity to Ward 12. Strong deterrent measures, including surveillance and penalties, must also be instituted to prevent future dumping.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this critical public health and environmental matter.

Yours faithfully,

Municipal Solid Waste Engineer & Environmental Expert
Mandya City Municipal Council

reports.complaintLetter:
To,
The Assistant Revenue Officer and Health Inspector,
Mandya Municipal Division,
Mandya City Municipal Council (MCMC).

Subject: Urgent Grievance Regarding Catastrophic Solid Waste Accumulation at Jayanagar (Ward 12) - Coordinates: 12.521757275072336, 76.87756250169619

Respected Officer,

I am writing to formally lodge an urgent complaint regarding a massive, hazardous mountain of solid waste that has accumulated at Jayanagar (Ward 12), located precisely at coordinates 12.521757275072336, 76.87756250169619. 

As visible from the site, tons of unsegregated plastic waste, municipal trash, and household debris have been allowed to pile up to hazardous levels, turning the area into an illegal open landfill. This situation is extremely dangerous; the decomposing organic matter combined with heavy plastics is generating toxic leachate, emitting noxious odors, and harboring disease-carrying vectors. 

Therefore, we urgently demand that the Mandya City Municipal Council coordinate the immediate deployment of clearance dumper trucks and mechanical loaders to clear this massive pile, safely transfer the waste to a designated processing facility, and implement strict surveillance to prevent further illegal dumping at this location.

Thanking you in anticipation of swift corrective action.

Yours faithfully,

Concerned Citizen and Municipal Solid Waste Engineer,
Jayanagar, Mandya.
